name: Nestle's Toll House Cookies
recipeIngredient: 12 ounces (2 cups) Nestle Semi-Sweet Chocolate Morsels
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat the oven to 375°F (190°C).
2. In a bowl, sift together the flour, baking soda, and salt.
3. In another large bowl, cream the butter and both sugars until light and fluffy.
4. Add the vanilla extract and water, beating until well combined.
5. Beat in the eggs one at a time, mixing until smooth.
6. Gradually stir in the dry ingredients until just combined.
7. Stir in the chocolate morsels and chopped nuts.
8. Drop rounded teaspoonfuls of dough onto ungreased cookie sheets.
9. Bake for 10-12 minutes, or until lightly golden brown.
10. Allow the cookies to cool on the baking sheet for a few minutes before transferring them to a wire rack to cool completely.
